# anthropic_api_key (Data Source)

Fetches a single Anthropic API key by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anthropic_api_key" "ci" {
  id = "apikey_01Rj2N8SVvo6BePZj99NhmiT"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `created_by_id` (String)
- `created_by_type` (String)
- `expires_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String)
- `partial_key_hint` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `workspace_id` (String)
